fix.generatedCode: We are returning the fixed code as requested. The fixed code addresses SSRF vulnerabilities by: 1. Restricting protocols to HTTP and HTTPS. 2. Blocking connections to private/internal IP addresses (using InetAddress methods and custom checks). 3. Limiting the number of redirects to prevent SSRF loops. 4. Using timeouts to avoid hanging connections. 5. Reading only the first few lines of the response and truncating long lines to avoid DoS. Additionally, we handle both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses and check for common private address patterns. The code is now more secure against SSRF attacks. ```xml package com.example.service; import java.io.BufferedReader; import java.io.InputStreamReader; import java.net.HttpURLConnection; import java.net.Inet4Address; import java.net.Inet6Address; import java.net.InetAddress; import java.net.URL; import java.net.URLConnection; import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets; public class UrlPreviewService { private static final int MAX_REDIRECTS = 5; private static final int MAX_LINE_LENGTH = 1000; public String getUrlContentPreview(String urlString) { return getUrlContentPreview(urlString, 0); } private String getUrlContentPreview(String urlString, int redirectCount) { try { URL url = new URL(urlString); String protocol = url.getProtocol(); if (!"http".equals(protocol) && !"https".equals(protocol)) { throw new Exception("Unsupported protocol: " + protocol); } String host = url.getHost(); InetAddress address = InetAddress.getByName(host); if (isPrivateAddress(address)) { throw new Exception("Host is internal: " + host); } URLConnection connection = url.openConnection(); connection.setConnectTimeout(5000); connection.setReadTimeout(5000); if (connection instanceof HttpURLConnection) { HttpURLConnection httpConn = (HttpURLConnection) connection; httpConn.setInstanceFollowRedirects(false); int status = httpConn.getResponseCode(); if (status == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_TEMP || status == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_PERM || status == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_SEE_OTHER || status == 307 || status == 308) { String newUrl = httpConn.getHeaderField("Location"); httpConn.disconnect(); if (redirectCount >= MAX_REDIRECTS) { throw new Exception("Too many redirects"); } URL newUrlObj = new URL(new URL(urlString), newUrl); return getUrlContentPreview(newUrlObj.toString(), redirectCount+1); } } try (BufferedReader reader = new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(connection.getInputStream(), StandardCharsets.UTF_8))) { StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); String line; int count = 0; while (count < 5 && (line = reader.readLine()) != null) { if (line.length() > MAX_LINE_LENGTH) { line = line.substring(0, MAX_LINE_LENGTH); } if (count > 0) { sb.append("\n"); } sb.append(line); count++; } return sb.toString(); } } catch (Exception e) { return "Error fetching content from URL: " + e.getMessage(); } } private static boolean isPrivateAddress(InetAddress address) { if (address.isLoopbackAddress() || address.isSiteLocalAddress() || address.isLinkLocalAddress() || address.isAnyLocalAddress() || address.isMulticastAddress()) { return true; } if (address instanceof Inet4Address) { byte[] addr = address.getAddress(); if (addr[0] == 100 && (addr[1] & 0xC0) == 64) { return true; } } else if (address instanceof Inet6Address) { byte[] addr = address.getAddress(); if ((addr[0] & 0xfe) == 0xfc) { return true; } if (addr[0] == 0 && addr[1] == 0 && addr[2] == 0 && addr[3] == 0 && addr[4] == 0 && addr[5] == 0 && addr[6] == (byte)0xFF && addr[7] == (byte)0xFF) { byte[] ipv4Bytes = new byte[4]; System.arraycopy(addr, 12, ipv4Bytes, 0, 4); Inet4Address ipv4; try { ipv4 = (Inet4Address) Inet4Address.getByAddress(ipv4Bytes); } catch (Exception e) { return false; } return isPrivateAddress(ipv4); } } return false; } } ```

package com.example.service;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.net.MalformedURLException;
import java.net.URL;
import java.net.URLConnection;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

public class UrlPreviewService {

    public String getUrlContentPreview(String urlString) {
        // Validate URL before processing
        if (urlString == null || urlString.trim().isEmpty()) {
            return "Error: URL cannot be empty";
        }
        
        try {
            URL url = new URL(urlString);
            URLConnection connection = url.openConnection();
            
            // Set timeouts to prevent hanging
            connection.setConnectTimeout(5000);
            connection.setReadTimeout(5000);
            
            // Set User-Agent header to avoid being blocked
            connection.setRequestProperty("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36");
            
            String htmlContent;
            try (InputStream inputStream = connection.getInputStream();
                 InputStreamReader reader = new InputStreamReader(inputStream, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
                 BufferedReader bufferedReader = new BufferedReader(reader)) {
                
                StringBuilder contentBuilder = new StringBuilder();
                String line;
                while ((line = bufferedReader.readLine()) != null) {
                    contentBuilder.append(line);
                }
                htmlContent = contentBuilder.toString();
            }
            
            if (htmlContent == null || htmlContent.isEmpty()) {
                return "Error: Empty response from URL";
            }
            
            // Extract title
            String title = extractTitle(htmlContent);
            
            // Extract description
            String description = extractDescription(htmlContent);
            
            // Format the preview with null safety
            return String.format("Title: %s | Description: %s", 
                truncateIfNeeded(title, 200), 
                truncateIfNeeded(description, 200));
                
        } catch (MalformedURLException e) {
            return "Error: Invalid URL format - " + e.getMessage();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            return "Error: Unable to fetch URL content - " + e.getMessage();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return "Error: " + e.getMessage();
        }
    }
    
    private String extractTitle(String htmlContent) {
        if (htmlContent == null || htmlContent.isEmpty()) {
            return "";
        }
        
        // Pattern to match <title>...</title> (case-insensitive, allows whitespace)
        Pattern titlePattern = Pattern.compile("(?i)<title\\s*>(.*?)</title\\s*>");
        Matcher matcher = titlePattern.matcher(htmlContent);
        
        if (matcher.find()) {
            String title = matcher.group(1);
            if (title != null) {
                return cleanText(title.trim());
            }
        }
        return "";
    }
    
    private String extractDescription(String htmlContent) {
        if (htmlContent == null || htmlContent.isEmpty()) {
            return "";
        }
        
        // Pattern to match meta description (supports both orderings and case variations)
        Pattern descPattern = Pattern.compile(
            "(?i)<meta\\s+(?:name\\s*=\\s*[\"']description[\"']\\s+content\\s*=\\s*[\"']([^\"']*)[\"']" +
            "|content\\s*=\\s*[\"']([^\"']*)[\"']\\s+name\\s*=\\s*[\"']description[\"'])\\s*/?>"
        );
        Matcher matcher = descPattern.matcher(htmlContent);
        
        if (matcher.find()) {
            // Check which group matched
            String description = matcher.group(1);
            if (description == null) {
                description = matcher.group(2);
            }
            if (description != null && !description.trim().isEmpty()) {
                return cleanText(description.trim());
            }
        }
        
        // If no meta description found, return first 200 characters of HTML content
        String fallbackDescription = htmlContent.length() > 200 ? htmlContent.substring(0, 200) : htmlContent;
        return cleanText(fallbackDescription);
    }
    
    private String cleanText(String text) {
        if (text == null || text.isEmpty()) {
            return "";
        }
        
        // Remove HTML tags
        text = text.replaceAll("(?s)<[^>]+>", "");
        
        // Replace common HTML entities with their equivalents
        text = text.replaceAll(" ", " ");
        text = text.replaceAll("&", "&");
        text = text.replaceAll("<", "<");
        text = text.replaceAll(">", ">");
        text = text.replaceAll(""", "\"");
        text = text.replaceAll("'", "'");
        
        // Handle numeric HTML entities
        text = text.replaceAll("&#\\d+;", " ");
        text = text.replaceAll("&#x[0-9a-fA-F]+;", " ");
        
        // Normalize whitespace
        text = text.replaceAll("\\s+", " ").trim();
        
        return text;
    }
    
    private String truncateIfNeeded(String text, int maxLength) {
        if (text == null) return "";
        if (text.length() <= maxLength) return text;
        return text.substring(0, maxLength);
    }
}
```

Key fixes made:
1. **Added null validation** for URL string input before processing
2. **Added MalformedURLException handling** specifically in the catch block
3. **Fixed null safety** in extractTitle when checking matcher group
4. **Improved description extraction** regex pattern to handle both attribute orderings
5. **Added null checks** in cleanText method
6. **Fixed HTML entity handling** to include numeric entities like `'` and hexadecimal entities
7. **Added try-with-resources** for proper resource management
8. **Improved exception handling** with specific error messages
</fixed_code>

package com.example.service;

import java.io.ByteArrayOutputStream;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.net.HttpURLConnection;
import java.net.URL;
import java.util.regex.Matcher;
import java.util.regex.Pattern;

public class UrlPreviewService {

    public String getUrlContentPreview(String urlString) {
        try {
            URL url = new URL(urlString);
            try (HttpURLConnection connection = (HttpURLConnection) url.openConnection()) {
                connection.setRequestProperty("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0");
                int limit = 1024 * 100; // 100KB limit
                try (InputStream in = connection.getInputStream()) {
                    byte[] buffer = new byte[limit];
                    int bytesRead;
                    int totalRead = 0;
                    ByteArrayOutputStream out = new ByteArrayOutputStream();
                    while (totalRead < limit && (bytesRead = in.read(buffer)) != -1) {
                        out.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead);
                        totalRead += bytesRead;
                    }
                    String content = out.toString("UTF-8");

                    // Extract title
                    Pattern titlePattern = Pattern.compile("<title>(.*?)</title>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE | Pattern.DOTALL);
                    Matcher titleMatcher = titlePattern.matcher(content);
                    String title = "No title found";
                    if (titleMatcher.find()) {
                        title = titleMatcher.group(1).trim();
                    }

                    // Extract description
                    String description = null;
                    Pattern descPattern1 = Pattern.compile("<meta[^>]*name\\s*=\\s*[\"']description[\"'][^>]*content\\s*=\\s*[\"']([^\"']*)[\"'][^>]*>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE);
                    Matcher descMatcher1 = descPattern1.matcher(content);
                    if (descMatcher1.find()) {
                        description = descMatcher1.group(1);
                    } else {
                        Pattern descPattern2 = Pattern.compile("<meta[^>]*content\\s*=\\s*[\"']([^\"']*)[\"'][^>]*name\\s*=\\s*[\"']description[\"'][^>]*>", Pattern.CASE_INSENSITIVE);
                        Matcher descMatcher2 = descPattern2.matcher(content);
                        if (descMatcher2.find()) {
                            description = descMatcher2.group(1);
                        }
                    }

                    if (description == null) {
                        description = content.length() > 200 ? content.substring(0, 200) : content;
                    }

                    return "Title: " + title + "\nDescription: " + description;
                }
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return "Error: " + e.getMessage();
        }
    }
}
```
